name: GeneDx Holdings Corp.
summary: GeneDx Holdings Corp. is a genomics company offering exome and genome sequencing tests, primarily ExomeDx and GenomeDx, for diagnosing rare and ultra-rare genetic pediatric disorders. Founded in 2000, the company leverages its proprietary GeneDx Infinity dataset (over 2.5 million tests, 1 million exomes/genomes) and AI-powered interpretation pipelines to deliver fast, accurate genetic diagnoses. It also provides biopharma data services and genomic newborn screening, supported by over 100 MDs/PhDs and 150 genetic counselors.
